authors: De Carolis G, Paroli M, Tollapi L, Doust M, Burgher AH, Yu C, Yang T, Morgan D, Amirdelfan K, Kapural L, Sitzman BT, Bundschu R, Vallejo R, Benyamin R, Yearwood TL, Gliner BE, Powell AA, Bradley K
title: Paresthesia-Independence: An Assessment of Technical Factors Related to 10 kHz Paresthesia-Free Spinal Cord Stimulation
study_question: Does HF10 pain relief depend on paresthesia overlap and midline lead positioning?
population_assessed: 61 adults with chronic intractable back and/or leg pain using HF10 therapy
outcome_measures: Pain relief, paresthesia-pain overlap, paresthesia laterality
inclusion_criteria: HF10 device implanted; chronic back and/or leg pain; up to 24 months use
answer_to_study_question: HF10 pain relief was unrelated to paresthesia overlap or precise midline positioning.
